property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.service.name
property.description: Name of the Ranger service containing policies for this Lake Formation instance. Must match the service name created in Ranger Admin.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.policy.rest.url
property.description: Comma-separated list of Ranger Admin REST endpoint URLs. Example: http://ranger-admin-1:6080,http://ranger-admin-2:6080

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.policy.rest.ssl.config.file
property.description: Path to SSL configuration file for Ranger Admin REST communication. Required when ranger.plugin.lakeformation.policy.rest.url uses HTTPS.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.policy.source.impl
property.description: Class to retrieve policies from Ranger Admin. Default uses REST client. For testing, use org.apache.ranger.admin.client.RangerAdminJersey2RESTClient

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.policy.pollIntervalMs
property.description: How frequently (in milliseconds) to poll Ranger Admin for policy updates. Default: 30000 (30 seconds).

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.policy.cache.dir
property.description: Directory where downloaded policies are cached locally. Used as fallback when Ranger Admin is unreachable.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.policy.rest.client.connection.timeoutMs
property.description: Connection timeout in milliseconds for Ranger Admin REST calls.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.policy.rest.client.read.timeoutMs
property.description: Read timeout in milliseconds for Ranger Admin REST calls.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.aws.region
property.description: AWS region where Lake Formation and Glue Data Catalog reside.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.aws.catalog.id
property.description: AWS Glue Data Catalog ID (AWS account ID). If empty, uses the default catalog for the configured AWS credentials.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.aws.role.arn
property.description: IAM Role ARN to assume for Lake Formation and Glue API calls. If empty, uses the default credential chain (instance profile, environment variables, etc.).

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.aws.sts.session.name
property.description: STS session name used when assuming the IAM role.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.sync.mode
property.description: Sync mode: "incremental" computes diffs between policy snapshots and applies only changes. "full" revokes all and re-grants on each refresh cycle. Default: incremental.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.sync.batch.size
property.description: Maximum number of Lake Formation grant/revoke operations to batch in a single API call. Default: 20.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.sync.retry.max
property.description: Maximum number of retries for failed Lake Formation API calls before writing to the dead-letter log.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.sync.retry.backoff.ms
property.description: Initial backoff in milliseconds for retry logic. Subsequent retries use exponential backoff (backoff * 2^attempt).

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.sync.retry.backoff.max.ms
property.description: Maximum backoff cap in milliseconds for exponential retry.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.sync.dead.letter.path
property.description: File path for the dead-letter log. Failed operations that exhaust retries are written here in JSON-lines format for manual remediation.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.principal.mapping.file
property.description: Path to the JSON file containing Ranger-to-IAM principal mappings. Maps Ranger users, groups, and roles to IAM ARNs.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.principal.unmapped.action
property.description: Action when a Ranger principal has no IAM mapping. "skip" — skip the permission entry and log a warning. "fail" — fail the entire policy conversion. Default: skip.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.wildcard.expand
property.description: Whether to expand wildcard resource patterns (e.g., "db_*") against the Glue Data Catalog. Lake Formation does not support wildcard grants, so expansion is required. Default: true.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.wildcard.catalog.cache.ttl.ms
property.description: TTL in milliseconds for the Glue Catalog metadata cache used during wildcard expansion. Default: 300000 (5 minutes).

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.gap.report.enabled
property.description: Whether to generate a gap report for unsupported Ranger features.

property.name: ranger.plugin.lakeformation.gap.report.path
property.description: File path where the gap report JSON is written after each sync cycle or bulk conversion.
